Casting strategy mixes ages 8–85, geography, profession. Pairs with the cultural insight memo (02:07 UTC).

Five cultural tensions framework: AI-fatigue → handmade hunger; permanence under deletion-culture; permission of the ordinary; care as luxury; civic gravity. The 'Cannes jury reads first' doc — cultural spine of the campaign.
